title: Claimer
description: A plugin to claim chunks with members
body:
# ❌ Project Archived

👋 Hello everyone ! This project is **archived** !

👉 To **continue to use** *Claimer*, use [this source code to countinue](https://github.com/Isax820/Claimer)

🥹 I'm sorry !

---


# 💻 Platforms

[![Purpur](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/cozy/supported/purpur_vector.svg)](https://purpurmc.org)

[![Spigot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/cozy/supported/spigot_vector.svg)](https://www.spigotmc.org/)
[![BungeeCord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/cozy/supported/bungeecord_vector.svg)](https://www.spigotmc.org/wiki/bungeecord/)

---

# 🗺️ Claimer – Chunk Protection Plugin

Description:

Claimer is a lightweight and powerful plugin for securing player builds on Spigot or Paper servers.
It allows players to claim chunks, manage trusted members, and automatically protect their areas from griefing.

Key Features:

- 🤟 Easily claim and unclaim chunks

- 🔨 Manage members in a claim (`/claim add <player> / /claim remove <player>`)

- 📜 Configurable maximum claims per player

- 🏃‍➡️ Automatic protection against block breaking and placing by non-members

- ❓ `/info` command to view plugin version, author, and description

- 📌 Saves data in config.yml for simple management

---

# 🛠️ Compatibility:

🖥️ Spigot & Paper (1.19+ recommended, compatible with 1.21.x)

---

# 🤩 Why choose Claimer?

- ⭐ Easy to install and configure

- 🎮 Perfect for survival, semi-RP, or community servers

- 🪶 Lightweight and efficient without requiring a database
